channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: NASA's Roman Space Telescope may reveal millions of hidden neutron stars
item.description: NASA's Roman Space Telescope could expose a vast hidden population of neutron stars lurking unseen across the Milky Way by detecting subtle shifts in light.

item.title: Scientists discover giant 'last titan' dinosaur, Southeast Asia's largest ever
item.description: A massive new dinosaur discovered in Thailand is rewriting Southeast Asia's prehistoric history. The newly named Nagatitan chaiyaphumensis was a colossal herbivore.

item.title: A graduate student's bold idea leads to a key aging discovery
item.description: A casual chat between graduate students sparked a breakthrough in aging research at Mayo Clinic. Researchers found that tiny synthetic...

item.title: Mars may have once had an ocean, and this chaotic valley is a big clue
item.description: A massive valley near Mars's equator reveals striking clues about the planet's watery and volcanic history. Stretching about 1,300 kilometers...
